form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recent effort finished 3rd over 340m at this track beaten 1.3 lengths (20.38) behind Johnny Dexter in a Grade 5 on April 15. Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on March 14 at Q Lakeside over 457m. Last start was second over 340m in 19.69, behind Maybe Yes. The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (20.50) in a Grade 5, finishing a 11 length third. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Others rate better this time.
